title: Paper and Cardboard
body:
This mod adds ***new paper and cardboard stuff*** with which you can create some cool things such as **Paper Planes**, **Balls of Paper**, **Cardboard Parts**, **Cardboard Tools** and **Cardboard Blocks**.

---

**Paper Stuff**:

Rightclick with paper to make a Ball of Paper, 

to create a Paper Plane just put Paper in the Crafting Table

rightclick Balls of Paper or Paper Planes to throw them.

---

**Cardboard**:

To make Cardboard Blocks you first need Cardboard Parts.

Cardboard Parts are obtained by Crafting 4 Paper and a Bucket of Water together.

When you have the Parts, crafting the Blocks is  easy, just put the Parts in a Shape similar to a Chest.

---

**Paper Trash Can**:

**The Paper Trash Can** works similar to a Hopper but instead of sucking the items into an inventory, 

it will just store them as ***normal pickable items*** and *stop them from despawning*.

when ***powered by redstone*** it will activate a **mini game** *where you need to drop paper or cardboard items into the basket*,

when you manage to do this some **particle effects** will pop up and a **sound is played**, 

when an **invalid item is dropped** it *gets shot out with a sound* that lets you know that you have done something wrong.


---


*have fun* :)



***You can commend your ideas***


---
